acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Driver-native allocation is proven against the advertised device.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Advertised format/modifier is used when possible.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Selected AR24 modifier 216172782120099856; GBM BO and submitted modifier match.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Frame result includes timestamp, damage, transform, and ready/fail status.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: native-dmabuf-capture.json records ready=true, timestamp CLOCK_MONOTONIC, transform=0, and full 1920x1080 damage.
No source or Nix files were changed; generated protocol glue and compiled helper remained in /tmp.
Only read-only qd/qdcli checks were attempted; qd migrate was not run.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Focused validation and practical repo gate pass.

residualRisk: The proof helper is disposable evidence code, not a committed production capture implementation.
